title: K-200 GCS Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 GCS Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-420-C. Revision: C. Type: procedure. Author: Aisha Mbeki. Created: 2024-03-25. Last modified: 2024-12-31. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1114, P-1126, P-1043, P-1022.
